title: selaginella molleri
intro: Selaginella molleri is a rare and endangered species of spore-producing plant, also known as a lycopod, belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella molleri include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its availability and use are highly regulated due to its endangered status.
